creator: ian@smartmedia.co.uk
text:
Get vm_bounce_alloc during install (or W command in Partition table edit)
When creating a BSD partition start 4194304 size 4192256 (2047 Meg)
(In custom install)
(/ file system is on 1G disk)

Fix: 

Work around, install BSD partition: start 32 size 4194272 (2047 Meg) 
Move other data on disk to partition start 4194304 size 4192256
How-To-Repeat: 
Try to create partition again.
